_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Build and deliver AI proof-of-concepts for high-priority use cases, documenting technical approach, results, limitations, and production readiness assessment.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-020 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-007 (AB, cosine: 0.438), LS-T-004 (LS, cosine: 0.422).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.1/10 (raw 0.314). Shared vocabulary: [build]. DCWF-only terms [maintain, materials, target] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, approach, assessment, cases, concepts, deliver] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.892, R=0.840). P exceeds R by 0.052 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.1%). "Build and maintain target materials." and "Build and deliver AI proof-of-concepts for high-priority use cases, documenting" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.447 > STS 0.314 (gap +0.134). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [build] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.7%. Shared tokens: [build]. DCWF-only: [maintain, materials, target]. WIDAI-only: [ai, approach, assessment, cases, concepts, deliver].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.134 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
